description: Complete Album Page overhaul implementing Chapters 2.4.1, 2.4.2, and 2.4.3 - Premium Album Hero with cinematic visual identity, dynamic color extraction, enhanced tracklist with playback integration, album metadata sections (credits, stats, description, timeline, similar albums, recommended artists, videos, AI insights, external links), sticky album bar, fullscreen artwork viewer, and responsive layouts with proper loading/empty/error states.
steps: 1. Create app/components/album/AlbumHero.tsx - Premium hero component with: dynamic background gradient derived from album artwork colors (using lib/color-extraction.ts pattern), large album artwork (1000x1000, square, rounded-xl, elevated with shadow/glow, hover animation scale 1.03 + lift), album title (largest text, display size), clickable artist name (Link to /artist/[id]), release year, genre tags (uppercase, wider tracking), track count, total duration, explicit badge, popularity indicator. Layout: 70vh height on desktop, two-column (artwork left, info right on desktop), single-column centered on mobile. Glass Level 5 for hero container. Staggered entrance animations following the motion timeline (150ms nav, 250ms bg, 450ms artwork, 600ms title, 750ms metadata, 900ms buttons, 1050ms stats).

2. Create app/components/album/DynamicBackground.tsx - Client component using useColorExtraction to extract colors from artwork URL and render layered background: large blurred artwork image, gradient overlay using extracted colors (primary, secondary, accent), noise texture layer (SVG filter pattern from globals.css ambient-film-grain), glass overlay layer, light bloom effect. Each album gets unique visual atmosphere. Fallback to theme colors if extraction fails.

3. Create app/components/album/AlbumArtwork.tsx - Client component for artwork display with: perfectly square aspect ratio, soft rounded corners (rounded-2xl), realistic shadow (shadow-2xl), ambient glow using extracted dominant color, glass reflection effect on hover, hover animation (scale 1.03, shadow increase, glow increase, 220ms duration). Click opens fullscreen ArtworkViewer. Missing artwork shows gradient placeholder with album initials in a glass frame.

4. Create app/components/album/ArtworkViewer.tsx - Client component for fullscreen artwork modal: fixed inset-0 overlay with blurred background, high-resolution artwork (1000x1000), zoom and pan support (transform: scale/translate), album metadata display, share button, close on Escape key, close button. Uses glass-ultra for the modal container. Traps focus for accessibility.

5. Create app/components/album/AlbumMetadata.tsx - Display album identity info: album title (font-size-display-sm or larger), artist name (clickable link, second largest), genres as uppercase pills with wider letter spacing, release year (muted), record label, album type from Spotify. Max content width 700px. Animated counters (0 to value over 800ms) for numeric stats.

6. Create app/components/album/AlbumActions.tsx - Replace existing app/components/AlbumActions.tsx wrapper. Enhanced with: Play Album Preview button (primary, uses AudioPlayerContext to queue all tracks), Favorite button (FavoriteAlbumButton), Share button (ShareMenu), Copy Link button, Open Spotify link, Open Apple Music link. Buttons use glass-medium, rounded-full pill style, hover animation (glow + lift + shadow). Consistent spacing.

7. Create app/components/album/AlbumStats.tsx - Glass cards (glass-light) displaying: Release Year, Tracks count, Total Duration, Popularity (from Spotify), Genres count, Preview Availability count. Animated counters (0 to value, 700-800ms duration). Statistics hover shows card lift effect.

8. Create app/components/album/AlbumDescription.tsx - Collapsible description section. Sources: Spotify editorial notes, Last.fm album info (future). Collapsed by default with Read More button. Animation on expand: height, opacity, blur transition. Empty state: 'No description is currently available.' styled as muted italic text.

9. Create app/components/album/Tracklist.tsx - Premium tracklist component. Each track row (TrackRow sub-component) contains: track number, small album artwork thumbnail, song title (link to /track/[id]), duration, explicit badge, play button (compact AudioPlayer), favorite button, share/more actions. Currently playing track shows: accent border, background glow using dynamic color, animated equalizer (AnimatedEqualizer component), progress bar, playing badge. Only one preview plays at a time (AudioPlayerContext handles this). Hover animation: glass reflection, artwork lift, shadow, play button appears. Track row uses glass-light on hover.

10. Create app/components/album/AlbumCredits.tsx - Display: Primary Artist, Featured Artists (from track artist names that differ from album artist), Record Label (from iTunes data), Copyright info. Each contributor is clickable when they have an artist page. Glass-light cards. Empty state handled gracefully.

11. Create app/components/album/AlbumDetails.tsx - Premium metadata cards displaying: Release Date (formatted), Genre, Label, Track Count, Duration, Popularity, Copyright, Album Type. Uses glass-light cards in a responsive grid.

12. Create app/components/album/SimilarAlbums.tsx - Horizontal carousel of related albums. Recommendation factors: same genre, same artist other albums (from iTunes getArtistAlbums), community tags. Display: 5 cards desktop, 3 tablet, 2 mobile. Each card uses AlbumCard pattern (artwork, title, artist, year). Uses HorizontalScroll component or custom carousel with snap scrolling. Empty state: 'Explore this artist\'s other releases.'

13. Create app/components/album/RecommendedArtists.tsx - Discovery section showing related artists. Uses getSimilarArtists from lib/lastfm.ts. Each card: portrait image, genres, similarity indicator, follower count, View Artist link. Glass-light cards in responsive grid.

14. Create app/components/album/MusicVideos.tsx - YouTube video section (reuses pattern from ArtistVideos.tsx). Fetches videos from /api/youtube endpoint with album + artist query. Video cards: thumbnail, duration overlay, title, channel, publish date. Hover preview effect. Empty state: 'Official videos are unavailable.' Error handling: hide section gracefully on YouTube API failure.

15. Create app/components/album/AIInsights.tsx - Placeholder section for future AI implementation. Display example insights as glass cards: 'This album introduced a darker musical style', 'This release became the artist\'s breakthrough album', 'Fans usually continue listening to...'. Architecture-only - static content with proper component structure for future implementation.

16. Create app/components/album/AlbumTimeline.tsx - Show album's place in artist's career. Fetch artist's albums (getArtistAlbums), sort chronologically, highlight current album. Display: horizontal timeline with previous album, current album (highlighted), next album. Each node shows artwork thumbnail and year. Users can click to navigate to other albums.

17. Create app/components/album/ExternalLinks.tsx - Links section: Spotify (from UnifiedAlbum.spotify.spotifyUrl), Apple Music / iTunes (from album.collectionViewUrl), YouTube search link. Open in new tabs. Styled as glass-light pill buttons with service icons.

18. Create app/components/album/StickyAlbumBar.tsx - Client component that appears after hero exits viewport (IntersectionObserver). Contains: small artwork (40px), album name, artist name, preview play button, favorite button, share, open spotify. Uses glass-medium, compact layout. Smooth show/hide transition. Positioned sticky below the main Header.

19. Create app/components/album/AlbumSkeleton.tsx - Enhanced loading skeleton for the full album page. Skeleton hero (artwork shimmer, title bars, metadata bars, button bars), skeleton tracklist (10 rows with shimmer), skeleton metadata cards. Uses shimmer-wave class from globals.css. Never displays blank content.

20. Update app/album/[id]/page.tsx - Complete rewrite of the album page as a Server Component that fetches all data (album tracks from iTunes, unified album from music-service, artist albums for timeline/similar, similar artists from Last.fm) using Promise.allSettled for graceful degradation. Compose all new album/ components in the proper reading flow order: Header, AlbumHero (with DynamicBackground, AlbumArtwork, AlbumMetadata, AlbumActions, AlbumStats), StickyAlbumBar, Tracklist, AlbumDescription, AlbumCredits, AlbumDetails, SimilarAlbums, MusicVideos, RecommendedArtists, AIInsights, AlbumTimeline, ExternalLinks, Footer. Pass data to each section, handle missing data gracefully (hide sections with no data rather than showing errors).
21. Update app/album/[id]/loading.tsx - Replace with AlbumSkeleton component for premium loading experience.
22. Update app/album/[id]/error.tsx - Enhanced error boundary with: Lucide icon, descriptive message, retry button, fallback navigation options. Uses glass-medium card styling.

23. Add any needed CSS classes to app/globals.css - Album-specific animations (artwork hover glow, counter animation keyframes, reflection sweep). Ensure all album components use existing design tokens and glass hierarchy.
24. Run bun run lint and bun run build to verify zero errors. Fix any TypeScript or ESLint issues.
acceptance_criteria: Album page renders with premium cinematic hero (dynamic background, elevated artwork, staggered animations)
Dynamic color extraction works - each album gets unique color palette applied to gradients, glows, and accents
Tracklist displays all tracks with play buttons, currently-playing indicator with equalizer animation
Only one preview plays at a time across the entire application
Sticky album bar appears when scrolling past the hero section
Fullscreen artwork viewer opens on artwork click and closes on Escape
Similar albums carousel shows related albums from the same artist
All sections handle empty/missing data gracefully without layout collapse
Responsive layout works on desktop (two-column hero), tablet, and mobile (single column)
Glass hierarchy is correct: hero=glass-ultra, nav/buttons=glass-medium, cards/tracklist=glass-light
All interactive elements have proper ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, and focus indicators
Reduced motion preference is respected (prefers-reduced-motion disables animations)
bun run lint passes with zero errors and zero warnings
bun run build succeeds with no TypeScript errors
verification: Run bun run lint and confirm zero errors/warnings
Run bun run build and confirm successful build with no compilation errors
